name: Unleashed Power Patron Portal - Terminus
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>絶</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぜっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>解</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>なる<ruby lang="jp"><rb>獄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>門</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－テルミナス
desc: Send 1 "Power Patron" monster from your Deck or Extra Deck to the GY, then you can add 1 DARK Fairy monster from your Deck to your hand, also you cannot declare attacks for the rest of this turn, except with "Power Patron" monsters. At the start of the Damage Step, if your "Power Patron" monster battles an opponent's monster: You can banish this card from your GY; banish (face-down) that opponent's monster. You can only use each effect of "Unleashed Power Patron Portal - Terminus" once per turn.
eff: Send 1 "Power Patron" monster from your Deck or Extra Deck to the GY, then you can add 1 DARK Fairy monster from your Deck to your hand, also you cannot declare attacks for the rest of this turn, except with "Power Patron" monsters. At the start of the Damage Step, if your "Power Patron" monster battles an opponent's monster: You can banish this card from your GY; banish (face-down) that opponent's monster. You can only use each effect of "Unleashed Power Patron Portal - Terminus" once per turn.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
Sends from your Extra Deck to your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
Banishes battling monster at the start of the Damage Step
